purpose: Educate young adults about the real health impacts of alcohol through compelling, data-driven social content.
mission: Reduce binge drinking among 18-30 year olds through awareness and community support.

audienceSegments.description: College students curious about reducing alcohol intake.
Young professionals reconsidering their relationship with drinking.

brandVoice: Direct, unflinching, and empathetic. We don't sugarcoat the data but we never shame. We speak peer-to-peer, not top-down.
